text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Perfect. This magic potion will get my
mind nice and sharp!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Some medicinal chameleon plant, some
brain-soothing chocolate, and finish it off with a
sweet orange juice base! Talk about a super
effective combo!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Drinking this is gonna make my genius magic even
better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho isn't feeling well, so I let her rest in
my office for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
choice_data_list: Any idea why it hurts so bad?
Any idea why it hurts so bad?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Leave me alone, will you? It's just a magical
disturbance! It happens to magical girls all the
time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I must've messed up that potion...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... My head hurts, so I'm gonna take the day
off! Get a fluffy futon ready for me, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho laments over her headache.
